subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose hand lie the reins of all created things and in Whose grasp is the kingdom of all contingent beings! I beseech Thee by the tears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا من بیدک زمام الکائنات و فی قبضتک ملکوت الممکنات اسئلک بعبرات
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
